info.name: AIquila
info.summary: Connect Nextcloud with Claude AI — chat, MCP tools, and voice
info.description:
**AIquila** connects your [Nextcloud](https://nextcloud.com) with [Claude AI](https://www.anthropic.com/claude) — private, self-hosted, and under your control.
### Nextcloud App
- **Chat** — Converse with Claude about your files and documents - **Summarize** — Generate concise summaries of any document - **Create & Edit** — Draft, rewrite, and refine content with AI assistance - **Text Tools** — Spellcheck, rephrase, and improve your writing
### MCP Server
AIquila includes a [Model Context Protocol](https://modelcontextprotocol.io) server with 100+ tools that gives Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Claude.ai, and the Claude mobile app direct access to your Nextcloud:
- **Files** — Browse, read, write, search, and share - **Calendar & Tasks** — View, create, and manage events and to-dos - **Contacts & Mail** — Read and manage address books, accounts, and messages - **Notes & Recipes** — Create and edit Markdown notes and recipes - **Bookmarks & Maps** — Manage bookmarks, GPS tracks, favorites, and photos
### Resources
- [Documentation](https://github.com/elgorro/aiquila/blob/main/docs/README.md) - [Source Code](https://github.com/elgorro/aiquila) - [Report Issues](https://github.com/elgorro/aiquila/issues) - [Discussions](https://github.com/elgorro/aiquila/discussions)
---
Made possible by [Claude](https://www.anthropic.com/claude) from [Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com) and the [Nextcloud](https://nextcloud.com) open-source community.
info.author: elgorro
